basics.name: Michaela Gillan
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.A. in Information & Computer Science in the Department of Information and Computer Sciences at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Spring, 2027.

highlights: Leading the redesign and optimization of the journal’s website using WordPress via Bluehost, improving usability and visual presentation.
Collaborating with editorial staff to copy-edit and review literary manuscripts for publication, ensuring clarity, consistency, and adherence to editorial standards.
Conducting research and compiling information to support the development of grant proposals, contributing to funding initiatives.
Assisting in maintaining the journal’s digital presence and supporting overall publication operations.

work.company: UH Manoa, College of Natural Science
highlights: Working under event coordination and marketing for an RIO that facilitates student engagement and enrichment.
Leading workshops, college tours, and acting as representatives for the University of Hawaii’s College of Natural Sciences
Conceptualizing and planning community outreach in the form of mixers and fundraising events within a team.
Working under event coordination and marketing for an RIO that facilitates student engagement and enrichment.
Leading workshops, college tours, and acting as representatives for the University of Hawaii’s College of Natural Sciences
Collaborating with staff to develop and host school events that foster bonding and networking among our students.
